sellers_note: This 2019 Toyota Camry LE represents a dependable midsize sedan built to meet the everyday needs of practical drivers who value reliability and solid performance.- 2.5L 4-cylinder engine with 8-speed automatic transmission- 28 city / 39 highway MPG- Entune 3.0 Audio Plus with app suite and Apple CarPlay- Power driver seat with electronic controls- Automatic headlights with delay-off function- Rear backup camera for enhanced parking awareness- Steering wheel-mounted audio controls- Remote keyless entry system- Electronic Stability Control and traction control- Four-wheel independent suspension- Four-wheel disc brakes with ABS- Dual front and side impact airbags with knee airbags- Toyota Safety Connect emergency communication system- 17-inch alloy wheels- Rear window defrosterThe white exterior finish of this Camry provides a clean, professional appearance that complements its practical design. With 62,304 miles on the odometer, this vehicle has been well-maintained and continues to deliver the performance Toyota sedans are known for.The interior prioritizes comfort and usability for daily commutes and longer drives alike. The front bucket seats offer support throughout your day, while the split-folding rear seats provide flexible cargo space when you need it. Climate control, power windows, and power door mirrors with outside temperature display contribute to a comfortable driving environment. The telescoping and tilt steering wheel allows you to find your ideal driving position.Safety has been engineered into every aspect of this Camry. The comprehensive airbag system includes front, side, and overhead protection, while the four-wheel independent suspension and speed-sensing steering provide controlled handling in various driving conditions. Electronic Stability Control, traction control, and low tire pressure warning systems work together to help keep you safe on the road.On the road, this Camry delivers responsive handling combined with fuel-efficient performance. The 8-speed automatic transmission works seamlessly with the 2.5L engine to deliver smooth acceleration while maximizing efficiency. Whether navigating city streets or cruising the highway, this sedan provides a balanced driving experience.The Entune 3.0 Audio Plus system keeps you connected with integrated app suite functionality and Apple CarPlay compatibility, allowing you to access your favorite media and navigation tools with ease. The 6-speaker sound system provides clear audio quality for your daily drives.We invite you to visit our showroom and experience this 2019 Toyota Camry LE for yourself. Our team is ready to answer your questions and help you understand why this vehicle could be the right choice for your transportation needs.Online pricing requires financing with dealership and pre-delivery inspection of $1495.
engine: Dynamic Force 2.5L I-4 port/direct injection, DOHC, VVT-iE/VVT-i
